; AHK v1 pipe-delimited mixed-event fixture used by test_ahk_v1_format()
; in test_engine.c. Format documented in src/event_format.c.
;   key|name|Down/Up|delay_ms
;   mousebtn|button|Down/Up|delay_ms
;   M|x|y|delay_ms
;   C|buttons|lt|rt|lx|ly|rx|ry|delay_ms
;
; The delays form cumulative timestamps in microseconds:
;   row 0:    0 ms
;   row 1:   25 ms
;   row 2:   75 ms
;   row 3:  125 ms
;   row 4:  175 ms
;   row 5:  225 ms
;   row 6:  275 ms
key|a|Down|0
key|a|Up|25
M|320|240|50
mousebtn|LButton|Down|50
mousebtn|LButton|Up|50
C|4096|16|20|512|-512|0|0|50
C|0|0|0|0|0|0|0|50
